attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

principles.name: A Good Time
principles.theme: Effortless participation in flow
principles.key_lyric: We dance with what's around us / There's a flow that has us in tow

principles.name: Authenticity
principles.theme: Pattern creates "fractured objectivity"
principles.key_lyric: Validity is transformed by what we see / Through fractured objectivity

principles.name: Darkness and Light
principles.theme: Fundamental dualities in perceptual programming
principles.key_lyric: My vision strains to see quite right / As I navigate through darkness and light

principles.name: Dreams
principles.theme: Collapsing potential requires directed conscious attention
principles.key_lyric: Life is full of endless dreams / With potential to come true / But not without attention from you

principles.name: Faith
principles.theme: Perception is limited to what matches our internal belief patterns
principles.key_lyric: As you know we really know nothin little can be proven / A resolution requires faith in somethin

principles.name: Freedom Is
principles.theme: Freedom as an internal frequency state, not an external condition
principles.key_lyric: Rivers flow to and fro, the waters are free but controlled

principles.name: Guiding Force
principles.theme: Tuning toward field's coherence patterns
principles.key_lyric: The one, the source, the guiding force, connects us all... Attracts us to our fate

principles.name: Listen
principles.theme: Discerning truth signals amidst noise and manipulation
principles.key_lyric: Now won't you come and listen to me / I'll show you things that you never have seen

principles.name: Love Song
principles.theme: Authentic connection enabling resonance
principles.key_lyric: But what is life for, if not sharing it, with someone that you submit / To a deep love, that seems to fit, and you commit that you'll never quit

principles.name: Moments
principles.theme: The immediate present as the sole point of frequency intervention
principles.key_lyric: Between every thought / Are infinite possibilities / In each instant you decide / The way that life proceeds

principles.name: Pattern
principles.theme: Recognizing unconscious broadcasting
principles.key_lyric: Down to our cells we have to learn how to discern / Structure emerging from the random forming like crystals in a cavern

principles.name: Signs
principles.theme: Reading interference patterns as feedback
principles.key_lyric: Events occur in patterns of coincidence... Upon observance the evidence sets a precedence / Of not just believing, but knowing with vetted confidence

principles.name: The Future
principles.theme: Breaking the loop of unconscious historical programming
principles.key_lyric: We live life the best we can / But what does that mean / We've been programmed like a machine

principles.name: The Mirage
principles.theme: Gap between sign perception and embodiment
principles.key_lyric: Off in the distance what could it be? / Wonders as far as the eye can see... Phantoms, of what could be to come

principles.name: The Passing Tide
principles.theme: Engaged acceptance without attachment
principles.key_lyric: We don't get to decide / What will be on the other side / But I want to know I tried / As I move past the passing tide

principles.name: The Power To Be Alive
principles.theme: Present-moment frequency agency
principles.key_lyric: You hold the power to be alive... So tune your mind to impressions you may have / And ask your heart is this the right path?

principles.name: Training Ground
principles.theme: Thoughts impact the quantum field
principles.key_lyric: Consciousness is not bound orchestrating a symphony of light and sound / We look for what we've found our awareness training ground.

principles.name: Truth and Lies
principles.theme: What you accept as truth is perspective-dependent
principles.key_lyric: Truth is a concept / That requires immense faith / In what we think we know to be true

principles.name: Tune Your Mind
principles.theme: Conscious frequency tuning formula
principles.key_lyric: Tune your mind with reflection / Use your attention with intention / Imagine what it is you want / If you're clear, it will appear

principles.name: Valley of Shadows
principles.theme: Belief systems create your perceptual lens
principles.key_lyric: I look through the lens / Of what I believe / And see what I see / As best I conceive

principles.name: What Life Is About
principles.theme: Your unique perspective IS the programming
principles.key_lyric: We see the world through our own set of eyes / Our point of view is where the secret lies

principles.name: Wonder
principles.theme: Questioning preconceptions as active tuning work
principles.key_lyric: Who are they? I wonder what they could be? / Who will help them see... If you won't?
